message:
feat(share): add crypto signing, deploy pipeline, and bundle enhancements

Crypto (crypto.rs — ~800 lines):
- Ed25519 keypair generation, serialization, and PEM encoding
- Detached signature creation and verification for byte slices
- Bundle manifest signing with embedded public key and timestamp
- Signature verification pipeline with key pinning support
- Comprehensive test suite: roundtrip signing, tamper detection,
  wrong-key rejection, manifest integrity checks

Deploy (deploy.rs — ~465 lines):
- Deployment pipeline for publishing signed bundles to remote targets
- Target resolution with URL validation and authentication
- Upload with progress tracking, retry logic, and checksum verification
- Rollback support for failed deployments
- Deployment receipt generation with audit trail

Bundle (bundle.rs — ~658 new lines):
- Extended bundle creation with compression (zstd), checksumming (blake3),
  and manifest embedding
- Multi-file bundle assembly with deduplication
- Bundle extraction with integrity verification
- Streaming bundle reader for large archives
- Test coverage for edge cases: empty bundles, corrupt archives,
  missing manifests, oversized payloads

Finalize (finalize.rs):
- Enhanced finalization pipeline with signing integration
- Post-finalization verification step

Scope/Scrub:
- Additional test coverage for scope boundary edge cases
- Scrub pipeline test improvements

Probe (probe.rs — new):
- Health probe endpoint support

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
